signin.title: Sign in
signin.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: If that account exists, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.
forgot.error: Couldn't send the reset email. Please try again.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters. Avoid passwords used elsewhere.
reset.success: Password reset. You can sign in now.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new link.
reset.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
reset.genericError: Couldn't reset the password. Please try again.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Account & Security
security.subtitle: Manage your sign-in credentials. Changes take effect immediately and may sign you out of other devices.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Pick a strong password you don't use elsewhere. We'll keep you signed in on this device.
changePassword.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters. Must differ from your current password.

errors.incorrectCurrent: That doesn't match your current password.
errors.generic: Couldn't update your password. Please try again.
